revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]Created page with '---- This is a [[wp:redirect|]] from a modification of the target's title; for example, its words are rearranged. In cases of modification from distinctly longer or...'
revision.text: ---- This is a [[wp:redirect|redirect]] from a modification of the target's title; for example, its words are rearranged. In cases of modification from distinctly longer or shorter names, please use {{tl|R from an incomplete name}} or {{tl|R from a longer name}}. <noinclude>[[Category:Templates for redirects from a modification of the target name]]</noinclude>

---- This is a [[wp:redirect|redirect]] from a modification of the target's title; for example, its words are rearranged. In cases of modification from distinctly longer or shorter names, please use {{tl|R from an incomplete name}} or {{tl|R from a longer name}}. <noinclude>[[Category:Templates for redirects from a modification of the target name]]</noinclude> <includeonly>{{{Category|[[Category:Redirects from modification]]}}}</includeonly>

revision.text: ---- This is a [[wp:redirect|redirect]] from a modification of the target's title; for example, its words are rearranged, or punctuation in the name is changed. In cases of modification from distinctly longer or shorter names, please use {{tl|R from an incomplete name}} or {{tl|R from full name}}. <noinclude>[[Category:Templates for redirects from a modification of the target name]][[Category:All redirect templates]]</noinclude> <includeonly>{{{Category|[[Category:Redirects from modifications]]}}}</includeonly>

revision.comment: green doc thingy, avoid listing transcluded pages as redirects to [[Wikipedia:Redirect]]
revision.text:
---- This is a [[w:Wikipedia:Redirect|redirect]] from a modification of the target's title; for example, its words are rearranged, or punctuation in the name is changed. In cases of modification from distinctly longer or shorter names, please use {{tl|R from an incomplete name}} or {{tl|R from full name}}. <includeonly>{{{Category|[[Category:Redirects from modifications]]}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation|content= [[Category:Templates for redirects from a modification of the target name]] [[Category:All redirect templates]]
}}</noinclude>

---- This is a [[w:Wikipedia:Redirect|redirect]] from a modification of the target's title; for example, its words are rearranged, or punctuation in the name is changed. In cases of modification from distinctly longer or shorter names, please use {{tl|R from an incomplete name}} or {{tl|R from full name}}. <includeonly>{{{Category|[[Category:Redirects from modifications]]}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation|content= [[Category:All redirect templates]] [[Category:Redirect templates|Modification]] [[Category:Redirect templates for which printworthiness is irrelevant]] [[Category:Templates for redirects from a modification of the target name]]
}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: moved [[Template:R from modification]] to [[Template:Redirect from modification]]: expand, clearer title

Anthony Appleyard moved page [[Template:Redirect from modification]] to [[Template:R from modification]]: Requested at [[Wikipedia:Requested moves]] as uncontroversial (//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Wikipedia:Requested_moves/Technical_requests&o...
Changed protection level of Template:R from modification: per request via RfPP ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Block all non-admin users] (indefinite))
reverse to clarify: a → a and b → b
enable "of" parameter regardless of "embed" parameter (whatever that's for - it's undocumented, and it's making about 75% of the code in here redundant)
bypassing redirs, per req. on talk page
bypassing redirs, per req. on talk page
more long/short cleanup per talk (forgot most of this code is redundant for no reason; see fix in sandbox)
rm {{{1}}} - many templates in this series need an includeonly of "{{Main other|{{R {{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy||un}}printworthy|embed=yes}}}}", and this one might, too.
make parameter useful in the This is a redirect template

revision.text: <noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat}}</noinclude> {{#ifeq:{{{embed}}}|yes |{{Redirect template |name=From a modification |from=a modification of {{{1|{{{reason|the target's title}}}}}}; for example, its words are rearranged, or punctuation in the name is changed |info=In cases of modification from distinctly longer or shorter names, please use {{tl|R from long name}} or {{tl|R from short name}}, respectively. ** Use this rcat instead of {{tl|R from other capitalisation}} and {{tl|R from plural}} in namespaces other than [[WP:Mainspace|mainspace]] for those types of modification. |all category=Redirects from modifications }} |{{Redirect template |from=a '''[[:Category:Redirects from modifications|modification]]''' of {{{1|{{{reason|the target's title}}}}}}; for example, its words are rearranged, or punctuation in the name is changed |info=In cases of modification from distinctly longer or shorter names, please use {{tl|R from long name}} or {{tl|R from short name}}, respectively. For more information follow the category link. ** Use this rcat instead of {{tl|R from other capitalisation}} and {{tl|R from plural}} in namespaces other than [[WP:Mainspace|mainspace]] for those types of modification. <includeonly> |all category=Redirects from modifications</includeonly> }} }}<noinclude> <!-- Categories are to be placed on the /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} <!-- This is template "R from modification". --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: noinclude must precede "real" template code directly, without intervening spaces or line breaks; Template: is superfluous
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{#ifeq:{{{embed}}}|yes
 |{{Redirect template
  |name=From a modification
  |from=a modification of {{{1|{{{reason|the target's title}}}}}}; for example, its words are rearranged, or punctuation in the name is changed
  |info=In cases of modification from distinctly longer or shorter names, please use {{tl|R from long name}} or {{tl|R from short name}}, respectively.
** Use this rcat instead of {{tl|R from other capitalisation}} and {{tl|R from plural}} in namespaces other than [[WP:Mainspace|mainspace]] for those types of modification.
  |all category=Redirects from modifications
 }}
 |{{Redirect template
  |from=a '''[[:Category:Redirects from modifications|modification]]''' of {{{1|{{{reason|the target's title}}}}}}; for example, its words are rearranged, or punctuation in the name is changed
  |info=In cases of modification from distinctly longer or shorter names, please use {{tl|R from long name}} or {{tl|R from short name}}, respectively.  For more information follow the category link.
** Use this rcat instead of {{tl|R from other capitalisation}} and {{tl|R from plural}} in namespaces other than [[WP:Mainspace|mainspace]] for those types of modification.
<includeonly>
  |all category=Redirects from modifications</includeonly>
 }}
}}<noinclude>

</noinclude>

  |info=
** Please note that there are are many {{em|more specific templates}}. Please use {{tlx|R from alternative spelling}} for spelling changes (including punctuation and spacing); see subcategories of [[:Category:Redirects from modifications]] for other specific options (capitals, diacritics, plurals, stylizations, transliteration, ligatures, different parts of speech, etc.). If you are unsure which to use, this template is okay to use; someone will make it more specific later if necessary.
** In cases of modification from distinctly longer or shorter names, please use {{tl|R from long name}} or {{tl|R from short name}}, respectively.
** Use this [[WP:rcat|rcat]] instead of {{tl|R from other capitalisation}} and {{tl|R from plural}} in namespaces other than [[WP:Mainspace|mainspace]] for those types of modification. This may also apply to several other subcategories of modification; please check those templates' output before saving if using outside of mainspace.
  |all category={{#ifeq:{{{demo}}}|yes||Redirects from modifications}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

  |info=
** Please note that there are many {{em|more specific templates}}. Please use {{tl|R from alternative spelling}} for spelling changes (including punctuation and spacing); see subcategories of [[:Category:Redirects from modifications]] for other options (capitals, abbreviations, diacritics, plurals, stylizations, transliteration, ligatures, different parts of speech, etc.). If you are unsure which to use, this template is fine; someone will make it more specific later if necessary.
** In cases of modification from distinctly longer or shorter names, please use {{tl|R from long name}} or {{tl|R from short name}}, respectively.  Abbreviations (including acronyms) should also receive {{tl|R from abbreviation}}.
** Use this [[WP:rcat|rcat]] instead of {{tl|R from other capitalisation}} and {{tl|R from plural}} in namespaces other than [[WP:Mainspace|mainspace]] for those types of modification. This may also apply to several other subcategories of modification; please check those templates' output before saving if using outside of mainspace.

}}<noinclude>

revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from modification
  |name=From a modification
  |from=a modification of the target's title or a closely related title.  For example, the words may be rearranged{{#if: {{{1|{{{reason|{{{of|}}}}}}}}}|. This redirect is a modification of: {{#ifexpr:{{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{reason|{{{of|}}}}}}}}}|"plainlinks"}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{{1|{{{reason|{{{of|}}}}}}}}}|{{!((}}}} = 0|{{no redirect|{{{1|{{{reason|{{{of|}}}}}}}}}}}|{{{1|{{{reason|{{{of|}}}}}}}}}}}}}
  |info=
** Please note that there are many {{em|more specific templates}}. Please use {{tl|R from alternative spelling}}, {{tl|R from alternative hyphenation}}, {{tl|R from alternative punctuation}}, {{tl|R from alternative spacing}} and {{tl|R from misquotation}} where relevant; see subcategories of [[:Category:Redirects from modifications]] for other options (capitals, abbreviations, diacritics, plurals, stylizations, transliteration, ligatures, different parts of speech, etc.). If you are unsure which to use, this template is fine; someone will make it more specific later if necessary.
** In cases of modification from distinctly longer or shorter names, please use {{tl|R from long name}} or {{tl|R from short name}}, respectively. An abbreviation should be tagged with {{tl|R from initialism}} or, if it can be spoken like a word such as NASA and RADAR, use {{tl|R from acronym}}.
** Use this [[WP:rcat|rcat]] instead of {{tl|R from other capitalisation}} and {{tl|R from plural}} in namespaces other than [[WP:Mainspace|mainspace]] for those types of modification. This may also apply to several other subcategories of modification; please check those templates' output before saving if using outside of mainspace.
  |all category={{#ifeq:{{{demo}}}|yes||Redirects from modifications}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
